message:
fix(command,store): AOF data loss — missing write commands and dirty tracking

Critical data loss fixes:

1. is_write_command: Add BLPOP, BRPOP, BLMPOP, LMPOP, ZMPOP, XREADGROUP
   to the write command list. Without this, successful immediate executions
   of these commands were not persisted to AOF, causing data loss on restart.

2. XREADGROUP: increment store.dirty when consuming new entries from a
   consumer group (NewEntries cursor). Without this, the dirty counter
   didn't advance, so the runtime's AOF capture gate (dirty_after >
   dirty_before) never triggered for XREADGROUP, silently dropping all
   consumer group state changes from the AOF.

Known remaining limitation: AOF rewrite and RDB snapshots do not yet
serialize consumer group PEL/consumers (only XGROUP CREATE with
last-delivered-id is preserved).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -834,6 +834,12 @@ pub fn is_write_command(cmd: &[u8]) -> bool {
             | CommandId::Zrangestore
             | CommandId::Bitfield
             | CommandId::Blmove
+            | CommandId::Blpop
+            | CommandId::Brpop
+            | CommandId::Blmpop
+            | CommandId::Lmpop
+            | CommandId::Zmpop
+            | CommandId::Xreadgroup
             | CommandId::Geosearchstore
     )
 }
